name: Bored API REST Eval
description: Evaluates REST mock generation quality using the Bored API OpenAPI 3.0 specification

examples.input: Generate WireMock mocks for the Bored API covering all 3 endpoints: GET /random, GET /filter, and GET /activity/{key}. Include realistic activity data in the responses.
examples.expectedOutput: 3 WireMock mappings covering GET /random, GET /filter, and GET /activity/{key} with realistic activity response bodies
